nodes.name: Severa credentials
nodes.notes: Set your Severa REST API Client ID and Client Secret here (from Severa UI → Rest Api settings). Replace YOUR_CLIENT_ID and YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET with your values.

nodes.name: Get Severa Access Token
nodes.notes: POST /v1/login/oauth/token with client_credentials. Uses client_id and client_secret from previous node. Outputs access_token (and refresh_token if API returns it).

nodes.name: Get Active Proposals1
nodes.notes: GET /v1/proposals with pagination. Returns all proposals (no status filter).
